description: Triggers for creating new skills, improving existing skills, and running evals

queries.query: Create a new skill for running database migrations
Build a custom skill that helps with code review
I want to create a skill for my team's deployment workflow
Make a new CLI skill for generating API documentation
Improve the existing brainstorming skill — run evals and optimize it
Develop a skill that helps with incident postmortem writing
Create a skill to help with sprint planning and estimation
Run evals on the resume-tailor skill and benchmark its performance
Build a custom skill for our internal code generation workflow
Extend the AI platform with a new skill for security review
Use the deep-research skill to investigate market trends
Optimize my resume with ATS keywords
Set up a CI/CD pipeline for my project
Help me prepare for my software engineering interview
Write a cover letter for a product manager role
Build an ABX strategy for our enterprise product
Design a system architecture for my application
Create a product strategy canvas for our SaaS
Transcribe my meeting recording and summarize it
Analyze my job offer and compare it to alternatives
